metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}]," are updated synchronously (vector + FTS5)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidator"}]," (async) processes entries during sleep cycles"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotion"}]," moves high-importance entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extraction"}]," pulls structured facts into Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}]," removes low-importance entries per policy"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"group","children":["Read Path",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}]," enters the Retrieval Engine"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Parallel dispatch"}]," to vector, text, and graph indices"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank Fusion"}]," combines scores using configurable weights"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]," assembles the final context window"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent receives"}]," consolidated, relevant context"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"group","children":["Consolidation |\n|-------|----------|---------|----------|\n| Ingestion | Working Memory | Agent observation | Immediate |\n| Indexing | Vector + FTS5 | Write completion | <50ms |\n| Consolidation | Episodic + Semantic | Sleep cycle | Minutes to hours |\n| Retrieval | Working Memory | Agent query | <100ms |\n| Eviction | Deleted | Retention policy | Configurable |"}]],["$","$L3",null,{"prev":{"title":"System Design","href":"/docs/architecture/system-design"},"next":{"title":"Sleep
